claim_boundary: This binding covers SkillGuard self-maintenance through one enforced declared-check workflow. Publication, installation, and release claims still require their own listed checks inside that same workflow.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: SkillGuard freezes and reconciles the target skill's own declared checks. The target skill alone owns domain purpose, failure classes, oracles, fixtures, and depth meaning.

action.summary: Execute and verify the self-host step step:inventory-static-surface.
Run the existing static SkillGuard check through its native owner.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:issue-static-audit-receipt.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:freeze-declared-check-inventory.
Run the existing deep-contract check through its native owner.
Reconcile every declared check and exact current result before enforced closure.
Execute the authoritative FlowGuard model and governance reviews.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:validate-binding.
Compile SkillGuard's own deterministic current contract and manifest through the real compiler facade.
Run deterministic compiler and bad-topology fixtures.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:select-function-route.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:claim-run.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:next-ready-step.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:record-step-event.
Run receipt, artifact, witnessed action, judged rubric, and native-check fixtures.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:issue-step-receipt.
Run monotonic closure and false-closure fixtures.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:issue-closure-receipt.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:scan-maintenance-unit-freshness.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:validate-maintenance-unit-evidence.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:issue-portfolio-receipt.
Inspect AGENTS.md, explicit author-repository adoption, target native routes, and duplicate-boundary risk.
Render the marker-bounded portable SkillGuard project maintenance prompt.
Install or upgrade the managed AGENTS.md block and project manifest without changing surrounding instructions.
Audit project prompt uniqueness, repository link, manifest integrity, native-route disposition, and currentness.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:refresh-global-router.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:check-global-registry-and-prompt.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:verify-target-handoff.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:resolve-canonical-source.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:compare-installed-and-repository.
Execute and verify the self-host step step:verify-release-provenance.
Require the selected target Guard to issue the current native route before SkillGuard sees any template catalog.
Load the target-authored neutral projection without inferring family, route, predicates, builders, or validators.
Validate complete target candidate accounting and current applicability evidence under the exact target route.
Apply only the generic zero/one/safe-many decision over target-authored applicability, compatibility, ownership, and dominance facts.
Issue the immutable selection receipt with full candidate and rejection accounting.
Materialize a read-only preview and block unresolved placeholders before any target write.
Hand the current selection and preview to the builder declared by the target Guard; SkillGuard never substitutes a domain builder.
Run or consume the exact target-native validator inventory; template structure cannot replace domain validation.
Issue an immutable instance receipt bound to selection, preview, parameters, artifacts, builder, and native validator receipts.
Record reused, created, or not-harvestable under the target's declared harvest policy.
